nasb.text: And there was a man called by the name of Zaccheus; he was a chief tax collector and he was rich.

esv.text: And behold, there was a man named Zacchaeus. He was a chief tax collector and was rich.

cnv.text: 有一個人名叫撒該，是稅吏長，又很富有。

ccb.text: 有个人名叫撒该，是税吏长，家财丰厚。

csbs.text: 看哪，有一个名叫撒该的人，是个税吏长，很富有。
